news.title: Nobel winner John Jumper to leave Google DeepMind for Anthropic
news.description: Jumper has been a key member of Google’s AI coding development team and his departure furthers strains the tech giant’s efforts to beat Anthropic, OpenAI and Elon Musk’s SpaceX in the race to build the most powerful AI models.

news.title: Google DeepMind loses Nobel laureate John Jumper to Anthropic, its third senior researcher to depart in as many months
news.description: Nobel laureate John Jumper departs Google DeepMind for Anthropic, the latest scientist to join the AI start-up amid a Silicon Valley talent race.
